steps: Dissolve 1 mg of MMC in 500 µL of dH2O.
This is the 1000x stock solution ( 6 millimolar (mM) ).
Aliquot this volume (we did it in 100 µL ) and store at -20 °C .
Mix 10 µL of MMC stock solution with 990 µL of FASW.
This is the working solution ( 60 millimolar (mM) ).
Induce WBR in at least two portions of the colony.
Gently dry around the edges of the regenerating pieces of tissue.
Dry the whole slide as much as possible.
Circle the regenerating pieces of tissue using the Pap pen.
Wait for the liquid to fully dry (~ 00:02:00 ).
Cover one tissue with as much FASW as possible (> 200 µL ) as control.
Cover the other pieces of tissue with as much MMC solution as possible.
Place the slide horizontally in the humidity chamber.
Place the chamber at a temperature close to their culture temperature.
Leave the slide to incubate for 24:00:00 .
Clean the Pap pen circles using a wet Q-tips.
Place the slide back in the aquarium.
creator: Marta Wawrzyniak
